_comment: Copy this file to xylem.config.json (in this same install/ directory) and fill in your machine-specific values. xylem.config.json is gitignored and NEVER committed. Every key below can also be supplied as an environment variable of the same name; environment variables take precedence over this file. Only fill in the servers you actually run — a server whose required values are missing is skipped, not written half-configured.
_local_stdio_servers: Absolute paths to each cloned server script, plus its per-server env values.
_remote_http_workers: The full connector URL for each Worker. The token is the last path segment — the whole URL is a secret. This is why it lives here (untracked), not in servers.json.
_optional: Uncomment / set any of these to override defaults. XYLEM_PYTHON forces a specific interpreter for the stdio servers (e.g. a venv); otherwise python3/python on PATH is used.
